en: "Sing, O barren one, who did not bear; break forth into singing and cry aloud, you who have not been in labor! For the children of the desolate one will be more than the children of her who is married," says the LORD.
zh: 不能生育、沒有生養過孩子的啊！ 你要歡呼。 沒有生產過的啊！你要發聲歡呼，高聲呼喊。 因為棄婦比有夫之婦有更多兒子。 這是耶和華說的。

en: "Enlarge the place of your tent, and let the curtains of your habitations be stretched out; do not hold back; lengthen your cords and strengthen your stakes.
zh: 要擴張你帳幕的地方， 伸展你居所的幔子，不要限制； 要拉長你的繩索， 堅固你的橛子。

en: For you will spread abroad to the right and to the left, and your offspring will possess the nations and will people the desolate cities.
zh: 因為你要向南向北擴展， 你的後裔必佔有列國之地， 又使荒廢了的城鎮有人居住。

en: "Fear not, for you will not be ashamed; be not confounded, for you will not be disgraced; for you will forget the shame of your youth, and the reproach of your widowhood you will remember no more.
zh: 不要懼怕，因為你必不致蒙羞； 也不要抱愧，因為你必不致受辱， 你必忘記你幼年時的羞愧， 也不再記念你寡居時的恥辱。

en: For your Maker is your husband, the LORD of hosts is his name; and the Holy One of Israel is your Redeemer, the God of the whole earth he is called.
zh: 因為造你的，就是你的丈夫； 萬軍之耶和華是他的名； 救贖你的，就是以色列的聖者； 他被稱為全地的 神。

en: For the LORD has called you like a wife deserted and grieved in spirit, like a wife of youth when she is cast off, says your God.
zh: 因為耶和華召喚你， 如同召喚被離棄、心靈憂傷的妻子， 就是幼年時所娶卻被棄絕的妻子； 這是你的 神說的。

en: For a brief moment I deserted you, but with great compassion I will gather you.
zh: 我只是暫時離棄你， 卻以極大的憐憫把你招聚回來。

en: In overflowing anger for a moment I hid my face from you, but with everlasting love I will have compassion on you," says the LORD, your Redeemer.
zh: 在怒氣漲溢的時候， 我暫時向你掩面， 卻要以永遠的慈愛憐憫你； 這是耶和華你的救贖主說的。

en: "This is like the days of Noah to me: as I swore that the waters of Noah should no more go over the earth, so I have sworn that I will not be angry with you, and will not rebuke you.
zh: 這事對我就好像挪亞時代的洪水一般； 我怎樣起誓不再使挪亞時代的洪水漫過大地， 我也照樣起誓不向你發怒， 也不斥責你。

en: For the mountains may depart and the hills be removed, but my steadfast love shall not depart from you, and my covenant of peace shall not be removed," says the LORD, who has compassion on you.
zh: 雖然大山可以挪開，小山可以遷移， 但我的慈愛必不從你身上挪開， 我和平的約也必不遷移； 這是憐憫你的耶和華說的。

en: "O afflicted one, storm-tossed and not comforted, behold, I will set your stones in antimony, and lay your foundations with sapphires.
zh: 受困苦、被風飄蕩、不得安慰的啊！ 你看，我要用彩色的石頭安置你的基石， 以藍寶石奠定你的根基。

en: I will make your pinnacles of agate, your gates of carbuncles, and all your wall of precious stones.
zh: 又用紅寶石做你的城樓， 用紅玉做你的城門， 用各種寶石做你四周的圍牆。

en: All your children shall be taught by the LORD, and great shall be the peace of your children.
zh: 你所有的兒女都必受耶和華的教導， 你的兒女必大享平安。

en: In righteousness you shall be established; you shall be far from oppression, for you shall not fear; and from terror, for it shall not come near you.
zh: 你必因公義得以堅立； 你必遠離欺壓，你必無所懼怕； 你也必遠離驚嚇，因為驚嚇必不會臨近你。

en: If anyone stirs up strife, it is not from me; whoever stirs up strife with you shall fall because of you.
zh: 看哪！必有人起來攻擊你，但那不是出於我； 攻擊你的，必因你仆倒。

en: Behold, I have created the smith who blows the fire of coals and produces a weapon for its purpose. I have also created the ravager to destroy;
zh: 看哪！那吹炭火、 打造出合用武器的鐵匠，是我創造的； 那殘害人、行毀滅的，也是我創造的。

en: no weapon that is fashioned against you shall succeed, and you shall confute every tongue that rises against you in judgment. This is the heritage of the servants of the LORD and their vindication from me, declares the LORD."
zh: 為攻擊你而製成的武器，都沒有效用； 在審判的時候興起來與你爭辯的舌頭，你都必定它為有罪。 這是耶和華眾僕人的產業， 他們的義是從我而得；這是耶和華說的。
